form.formComment: Won two starts back over 366m at Capalaba. Last start he finished 4th on March 5 over 520m at Q Parklands behind Cause Celebre beaten 5 lengths (30.61) in a Grade 6. Draw likely to suit. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.34) when sixth over 457m at this track in a Grade 6. Starts from box 2 for the first time here. Has ability and should be around the money.

form.formComment: Won her last two including a strong win last start racing on the pace over 366m at Capalaba by 6 lengths in a Maiden. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.
